hero_banner.trigger_logic: First module of detail page. Has main_title + product hero shot.

gestalt_rules.hierarchy: main_title on top, body description below

hero_banner.spatial_prompt_injection: Product centered in the frame. The top quarter of the frame must be clean atmospheric negative space ready for headline text. Soft floor shadow beneath product.
hero_banner.translator_instruction: 详情页首屏横幅。提示词要求顶部 25% 留出纯净背景用于标题。产品居中放置在画面中央。

ingredient_zigzag_left.category: 成分解析 - Z字型左留白
ingredient_zigzag_left.trigger_logic: Component breakdown (Array item 1, 3, 5). Ingredient macro on right, text on left.

gestalt_rules.hierarchy: Ingredient name H2 (bold), description Body (regular), tight proximity

ingredient_zigzag_left.spatial_prompt_injection: The core subject MUST be positioned strictly on the right 60% of the canvas. The left 40% of the frame MUST be completely empty, pure seamless negative space. No textures, no objects, no distractions on the left side.
ingredient_zigzag_left.translator_instruction: 向 Translator 强力注入左侧留白指令。排版引擎在渲染时，将成分说明文字严格局限在左侧 40% 的纯净区域内，实现标准的左文右图。

ingredient_zigzag_right.category: 成分解析 - Z字型右留白
ingredient_zigzag_right.trigger_logic: Component breakdown (Array item 2, 4, 6). Ingredient macro on left, text on right.

gestalt_rules.hierarchy: Ingredient name H2 (bold), description Body (regular), tight proximity

ingredient_zigzag_right.spatial_prompt_injection: The core subject MUST be positioned strictly on the left 60% of the canvas. The right 40% of the frame MUST be completely empty, pure seamless negative space. No textures, no objects, no distractions on the right side.
ingredient_zigzag_right.translator_instruction: 配合 ingredient_zigzag_left 交替使用。Python 脚本循环读取成分数组时，奇数项用 left、偶数项用 right，自动形成视线引导完美的 Z 字型瀑布流排版。

texture_smear_bottom_text.category: 肤感/质地展示 - 底部文字托盘
texture_smear_bottom_text.trigger_logic: Texture showcase or multi-step usage guide. Highly detailed visual at top.

gestalt_rules.hierarchy: Centered title, body text description for usage steps

texture_smear_bottom_text.spatial_prompt_injection: The highly detailed texture or macro subject must occupy the bottom 55% of the frame. The top 45% of the canvas must be a clean, flat, uncluttered solid color block or extremely soft gradient, forming a completely empty base for headline text.
texture_smear_bottom_text.translator_instruction: 质地图往往极其复杂（如飞溅的水、拉丝的乳霜）。强制模型在下方 35% 生成干净的「文字托盘」，彻底解决复杂背景导致文字无法阅读的痛点。

model_lifestyle_side_anchor.category: 模特/使用场景 - 侧边大面积留白
model_lifestyle_side_anchor.trigger_logic: Human face or lifestyle application shot. Needs emotional connection.

gestalt_rules.text_zone: Left 50%, large typography for emotional quotes
gestalt_rules.hierarchy: Oversized elegant serif quote, small sans-serif attribution

model_lifestyle_side_anchor.spatial_prompt_injection: Human model positioned on the right edge of the frame, looking towards the left. The entire left half (50%) of the image must be a vast, clean, soft atmospheric negative space. No background clutter on the left.
model_lifestyle_side_anchor.translator_instruction: 带有模特人脸的图极易显得拥挤。强制将人物挤向一侧，留出一半的绝对呼吸空间，用于放置大字号的情绪感染力文案。

three_column_features.trigger_logic: Has 3 feature_icons + 3 short labels. Grid layout.
three_column_features.spatial_prompt_injection: Create three evenly spaced columns across the full frame. Each column has a centered circular or rounded area at the top for icon placement. The rest of each column should be clean uniform background.
three_column_features.translator_instruction: 三列对比模块。生图提示词要求画面等分为三列，每列顶部留出圆形或圆角图标区。三列底色统一均匀。

split_before_after.trigger_logic: Has before_after comparison. Product has visible transformation effect.

gestalt_rules.hierarchy: Before on left, after on right, caption below

split_before_after.spatial_prompt_injection: Split the frame vertically down the middle. Left side shows before state with subtle warm tone. Right side shows after state with bright clean lighting. The bottom 20% of the frame must be empty uniform background for caption text.
split_before_after.translator_instruction: 前后对比模块。提示词要求画面垂直对半分割，左侧暖调「使用前」，右侧亮调「使用后」，底部留出 20% 背景区放标注文字。

full_bleed_lifestyle.trigger_logic: Has lifestyle_story or emotion_description. No complex text, only short tagline.

gestalt_rules.hierarchy: Tagline floating at bottom with slight dark overlay for readability

full_bleed_lifestyle.spatial_prompt_injection: Full-bleed immersive lifestyle scene. The bottom 15% of the frame should have a subtle dark gradient overlay area suitable for placing a clean white tagline text.
full_bleed_lifestyle.translator_instruction: 全幅生活方式模块。无边全幅场景图，底部 15% 加暗色渐变区用于放白色标语文字。提示词要强调沉浸感。
full_bleed_lifestyle.rendering_hint: 使用 soft_brush 边缘与上一模块拼接

texture_center_floating.category: 悬浮微距展示 - 中轴构图，两翼留白
texture_center_floating.trigger_logic: Highly viscous texture (e.g., oil, serum, honey) with multiple short feature callouts.

gestalt_rules.text_zone: Left 25% and Right 25% symmetrically, text floating around the center subject
gestalt_rules.hierarchy: Small elegant badges with short descriptions, left and right flanks

texture_center_floating.spatial_prompt_injection: The macro subject MUST be positioned floating perfectly in the vertical center of the frame. The entire left 25% and the entire right 25% of the canvas MUST be completely empty, pure seamless negative space. NO elements allowed on the left and right edges.
texture_center_floating.translator_instruction: 强制 Flow 在画面正中央画质地，把左右两侧彻底清空。底图生成后，排版渲染引擎分别在左右两侧的安全区内执行对齐印字。
texture_center_floating.rendering_hint: 使用正弦波边缘与上一模块拼接

authority_endorsement_split.category: 专家背书 - 侧边人像聚焦
authority_endorsement_split.trigger_logic: Requires expert portrait, doctor, or scientist with lab context and certification text.

gestalt_rules.text_zone: Right 60% of the canvas, large numerical data highlight
gestalt_rules.hierarchy: Huge numbers (e.g., 57%), heavy bold title, small clinical text

authority_endorsement_split.spatial_prompt_injection: A professional portrait of a scientist on the strictly left 40% of the frame. The background is a highly blurred out-of-focus laboratory. The right 60% of the image MUST be a clean, dark, or solid color overlay area, serving as completely empty negative space for text. Do not generate text in the image.
authority_endorsement_split.translator_instruction: 限制专家只能出现在左侧，右侧强制生成大面积纯净暗区或色块。代码后续在右侧 60% 的区域排版巨大的实验数据和认证文案。

module_arch_window.category: 焦点视窗/对比展示 - 拱门遮罩布局
module_arch_window.trigger_logic: Has before/after comparison OR concentrated scalp/hair texture shot.

gestalt_rules.text_zone: Top 15% and Bottom 15% outside the arch
gestalt_rules.hierarchy: Elegant serif titles wrapping the top curve, minimal labels below

module_arch_window.spatial_prompt_injection: Generate the entire image as a highly detailed macro texture or lifestyle scene filling the entire 100% of the frame. DO NOT generate any borders or text areas.
module_arch_window.translator_instruction: Flow 输出满屏底图。Python 渲染引擎调用 apply_arch_mask() 将底图裁切成拱门形状，贴在全局背景色上。文字排版在拱门外的上下区域。
module_arch_window.rendering_hint: 拱门遮罩：调用 apply_arch_mask() 裁切，然后在拱门外渲染文本。免去 Flow 画边缘的幻觉风险。
